rulings.Case Title: ANGELO DATIS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Carrier Corporation Of California To Produce Its Custodian(S) Of Records, Person(S) Most Knowledgeable And Documents At Deposition
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, May 26, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff¿s motion to compel the deposition of defendant Carrier Corp.¿s person most knowledgeable and custodian of records and production of documents is off calendar at the moving party¿s request. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder Of Plaintiffs Represented By Harowitz Tigerman, Llp In Plaintiffs Motion To Compel The Annual Update To Response To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiffs Interrogatories From Defendant National Steel And Shipbuilding Company
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, May 26, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2. Harowitz & Tigerman, LLP¿s joinder in plaintiffs¿ motion to compel annual responses to General Order 129 standard plaintiffs¿ interrogatories from defendant National Steel and Shipbuilding Company is granted. No opposition filed. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Joinder Of Plaintiffs Represented By Harowitz & Tigerman, Llp In Plaintiffs Motion To Compel The Annual Update To Response To General Order 129 Standard Plaintiffs Interrogatories From Defendant Republic Supply Company
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Thursday, May 26, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 2.
